name: Sate Ayam (Chicken Grilled on Skewers)
recipeIngredient: 2 red chillies or 1/2 teaspoon sambal oel
2 teaspoons palm sugar or substitute (ordinary sugar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove bones from chicken and discard skin.
2. Cut chicken into small cubes.
3. In an electric blender, combine seeded and roughly chopped chillies, onions, ginger, lemon juice, salt, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, sesame oil, palm sugar (or ordinary sugar), and cook until smooth.
4. Pour mixture into a bowl and stir in the remaining ingredients. Add chicken and coat each piece thoroughly with the marinade. Cover and marinate for at least one hour. Overnight refrigeration is possible.
5. Thread marinated chicken pieces onto bamboo skewers that have been soaked in cold water for 1-2 hours, leaving space at the blunt end of each skewer.
6. Grill over hot coals or under a pre-heated grill (broiler), about 5 cm (2 inches) from the heat source, for 5-8 minutes until chicken is crisp and brown. Brush with additional oil on both sides during grilling.
7. In a small saucepan, combine remaining marinade, thick coconut milk, and simmer over low heat until smooth and thickened, stirring constantly. Serve in a small bowl alongside the satay.
